profile.name: Kenneth Jennings
profile.headline: Information Systems @ Ball State University | Intern Career Growth Now
profile.summary: I'm Kenneth Jennings, a success-driven first-year student at Ball State University studying Business Information Systems; I am also a part of the prestigious Miller Leadership Academy scholarship program. On campus, I have multiple involvements: the Miller College of Business' Dean's Student Advisory Council, Student Government Association, Pi Kappa Alpha Fraternity, Residence Hall Council, and Esports Team Management. I am passionate about learning cloud computing, AI database structuring, hardware, and digital asset C2C services.

tasks: Analyzing UI, providing constructive feedback, suggestions for improvement.
Connecting with managers from Fortune 100 organizations to enhance website credibility.
Streamlining processes to create greater efficiency to better user experience with website.

education.school: Ball State University - Miller College of Business
education.degree: Bachelor of Science - BS, Business Information Systems
